description: Project scaffolding and build system -- package.json, tsconfig, directory layout per Section 4.5, dependency list satisfying C-01 (zero-license). Establishes the Node.js project container with Three.js, Puppeteer, FFmpeg, Zod, and Commander as allowed dependencies.
notes: Tier 0 foundation. No dependencies. Covers C-01. Spec completed via 4-round deliberation.
